children.name: hwPoePower
children.description: This object identifies the maximum POE power of the system.

nodes.name: hwPoePowerInfoTable
nodes.description: This object indicates the table that contains the power information of POE.

nodes.name: hwPoeSlotTable
nodes.description: This object indicates the slot configuration table of POE.

nodes.name: hwPoePortJudgeTable
nodes.description: This object indicates the table that contains the judgement of whether port supports POE.

children.name: hwPoePortJudgeEntry
children.description: This object indicates the entry of table.

nodes.name: hwPoeMultiMcuTable
nodes.description: This object indicates the slot configuration table of multi-mcu POE.

nodes.name: hwPoePortTable
nodes.description: This object indicates the table that contains the configuration parameters of a POE interface. One entry corresponds to a POE interface.

children.name: hwTrapProbableCause
children.description: The probable cause of poe trap.

children.name: hwPoeCardID
children.description: This object identifies the poe card ID.

children.name: hwPoeChipID
children.description: This object identifies the control chip ID.

children.name: hwPoePdPriority
children.description: This object identifies the PD priority.(1:critical, 2:high, 3:low(default))

children.name: hwPoeSlotStr
children.description: This object identifies the poe card String.

children.name: hwPoeTrapFaultID
children.description: The probable fault id of poe trap.

children.name: hwPoeConsumPowerThreshold
children.description: This object identifies the threshold of consuming power.

children.name: hwPoeSlotNum
children.description: This object identifies the slot ID.

children.name: hwPoeDeviceID
children.description: This object identifies the device ID.

children.name: hwFrameID
children.description: This object identifies the CSS Frame ID.
